title: Mace to 3D pufferfish
description: Ever wanted to hit your enemies with a pufferfish? Now you can! This pack replaces the standard Mace with a 3D model of a pufferfish on a stick. Perfect for adding a bit of humor to your combat.
body:
# 🐡 Pufferfish Mace [3D]

Ever wanted to hit your enemies with a pufferfish? Now you can! 
This resource pack replaces the standard Mace with a fun **3D model of a pufferfish impaled on a stick**. 

Perfect for adding a bit of humor to your combat experience!

***

### 🛠 Technical Info
* **Version:** 3D Model
* **Compatibility:** 1.21+
* **Requirement:** Minecraft Java Edition

⚠️ **Please read the changelog carefully. On different versions the resource pack may look different.**
